title: The Fed - FAQs
summary: This source is a Federal Reserve FAQ page providing institutional information about the FOMC, including links to meeting calendars, transcripts, projection methodologies, and general Fed resources. The page contains no specific policy decisions, economic data, or market-moving content. The source body was truncated, but the visible content consists primarily of site navigation and section headers from the Fed's main website structure.
